'''yolagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yong|yong]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yong|yong]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yolagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yolagithi|yolagithi]] || [[word:yolagiji|yolagiji]] || [[word:yolagishi|yolagishi]] || [[word:yolagiki|yolagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yolaguthuthu|yolaguthuthu]] || [[word:yolagujuju|yolagujuju]] || [[word:yolagushushu|yolagushushu]] || [[word:yolagukuku|yolagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yolaguthu|yolaguthu]] || [[word:yolaguju|yolaguju]] || [[word:yolagushu|yolagushu]] || [[word:yolaguku|yolaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yolagufthuf|yolagufthuf]] || [[word:yolagufjuf|yolagufjuf]] || [[word:yolagufshuf|yolagufshuf]] || [[word:yolagufkuf|yolagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yolagethe|yolagethe]] || [[word:yolageje|yolageje]] || [[word:yolageshe|yolageshe]] || [[word:yolageke|yolageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yolagothotho|yolagothotho]] || [[word:yolagojojo|yolagojojo]] || [[word:yolagoshosho|yolagoshosho]] || [[word:yolagokoko|yolagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yolagotho|yolagotho]] || [[word:yolagojo|yolagojo]] || [[word:yolagosho|yolagosho]] || [[word:yolagoko|yolagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yolagofthof|yolagofthof]] || [[word:yolagofjof|yolagofjof]] || [[word:yolagofshof|yolagofshof]] || [[word:yolagofkof|yolagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfthĂŻf|yolagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfjĂŻf|yolagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfshĂŻf|yolagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfkĂŻf|yolagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|yolagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|yolagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|yolagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|yolagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfthĂŻf|yolagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfjĂŻf|yolagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfshĂŻf|yolagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfkĂŻf|yolagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfthĂŻf|yolagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfjĂŻf|yolagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfshĂŻf|yolagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yolagĂŻfkĂŻf|yolagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yolagĂŠthĂŠ|yolagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yolagĂŠjĂŠ|yolagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yolagĂŠshĂŠ|yolagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yolagĂŠkĂŠ|yolagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yolagathatha|yolagathatha]] || [[word:yolagajaja|yolagajaja]] || [[word:yolagashasha|yolagashasha]] || [[word:yolagakaka|yolagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yolagatha|yolagatha]] || [[word:yolagaja|yolagaja]] || [[word:yolagasha|yolagasha]] || [[word:yolagaka|yolagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yolagafthaf|yolagafthaf]] || [[word:yolagafjaf|yolagafjaf]] || [[word:yolagafshaf|yolagafshaf]] || [[word:yolagafkaf|yolagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yolagasha|yolagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yolagshĂ«sha|yolagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yolagrosha|yolagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yolagmusha|yolagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yolagyasha|yolagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyolagnkshĂ«sha|goyolagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyolagnkrosha|goyolagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyolagnkmusha|goyolagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyolagnkyasha|goyolagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yolalagasha|yolalagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yolalagshĂ«sha|yolalagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yolalagrosha|yolalagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yolalagmusha|yolalagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yolalagyasha|yolalagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyolalagnkshĂ«sha|goyolalagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyolalagnkrosha|goyolalagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyolalagnkmusha|goyolalagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyolalagnkyasha|goyolalagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yelĂŠgasha|yelĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yelĂŠgshĂ«sha|yelĂŠgshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yelĂŠgrosha|yelĂŠgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yelĂŠgmusha|yelĂŠgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yelĂŠgyasha|yelĂŠgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyelĂŠgnkshĂ«sha|goyelĂŠgnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyelĂŠgnkrosha|goyelĂŠgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyelĂŠgnkmusha|goyelĂŠgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyelĂŠgnkyasha|goyelĂŠgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yolfagasha|yolfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yolfagshĂ«sha|yolfagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yolfagrosha|yolfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yolfagmusha|yolfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yolfagyasha|yolfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyolfagnkshĂ«sha|goyolfagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyolfagnkrosha|goyolfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyolfagnkmusha|goyolfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyolfagnkyasha|goyolfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
